label: Library Release Line
description: Product release line a LIBRARY_DOC documents (CASE-518). Part of LIBRARY_DOC identity [slug, release] so v1 and v2 libraries stay live in parallel — NOT the document version (each (slug,release) still has its own regen version history). Values are product-qualified (e.g. wip-v1) to disambiguate which product and future-proof multi-product libraries. mutable: new release lines added additively. MUST NOT carry aliases: the identity hash keys on the raw submitted value, so an alias would orphan-duplicate (CASE-316/317 class — confirmed by the term-as-identity spike, APP-KB-20260628).

terms.label: WIP v2
terms.description: WIP release line 2 (template-ID redesign / v2 in flight).
